article.title: Chinese court rules companies can't fire workers just because AI is cheaper — ruling says automation alone doesn't justify layoffs
article.summary: Chinese courts ruled that companies cannot automatically fire workers simply because AI can do the job more cheaply, declaring that automation alone does not justify dismissal under labor law.
article.title_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能因 AI 更便宜而開除員工 — 裁決表示自動化本身不足以成為裁員理由
article.summary_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能僅因 AI 可更便宜地完成工作就自動開除員工，宣稱自動化本身在勞動法下不足以正當化解僱。

article.title: Why would I want an AI agent to replace my phone?
article.summary: You can’t go anywhere on the internet today without running into AI. In some cases, that’s useful. AI can do some amazing things. On the other hand, it often feels like we’re watching someone reinvent the wheel. Now, word on the street is that OpenAI wants to build its own phone with an experience built around AI agents. Put simply, I think that sounds horrible. more…
article.title_zh: 為什麼我會想要 AI 代理來取代我的手機？
article.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 無所不在，OpenAI 據聞計畫打造自己的手機，帶來全新的體驗。

article.title: Google explains why Android AICore occasionally takes up more storage
article.summary: Android AICore lets you “run generative AI features directly on your Android phone or tablet’s hardware.” These models ( Gemini Nano ) are inherently large, but Google now has a more detailed explanation of why Android AICore storage occasionally spikes. more…
article.title_zh: Google 解釋為何 Android AICore 偶爾會佔用更多存儲空間
article.summary_zh: Android AICore 可讓用戶直接在 Android 手機或平板電腦硬件上運行生成式 AI 功能。Google 現已詳細解釋了 Android AICore 存儲偶爾激增的原因。

article.title: Anthropic in early talks to buy DRAM-less AI inference chips from UK startup — Fractile's SRAM architecture reduces need for pricey memory during extreme pricing and shortage crunch
article.summary: Anthropic has reportedly held early discussions with London-based chip startup Fractile about purchasing the company's inference accelerators.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 在早期洽談向英國新創購買無 DRAM AI 推論晶片 — Fractile 的 SRAM 架構在極端價格和短缺危機期間降低昂貴記憶體的需求
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 據報已與倫敦晶片新創公司 Fractile 進行早期討論，商談購買其推論加速器。

article.title: Google訂閱用戶突破3.5億　雲端營收達200億美元卻喊「運算產能吃緊」
article.summary: Google母公司Alphabet在2026年第1季展現強勁的AI變現能力，受惠於雲端基礎設施與自研晶片的優勢，營收與獲利均超越預期，投資前景明顯優於同業大廠。不僅雲端業務首度突破200億美元大關，整體AI基礎建設的擴張也顯示出這場大廠間的軍備競賽已進入白熱化階段，四大超大規模業者2026年合計資本支出計畫已攀升至7...
article.title_zh: Google訂閱用戶突破3.5億　雲端營收達200億美元卻喊「運算產能吃緊」
article.summary_zh: Google母公司Alphabet在2026年第1季展現強勁的AI變現能力，受惠於雲端基礎設施與自研晶片的優勢，營收與獲利均超越預期，投資前景明顯優於同業大廠。不僅雲端業務首度突破200億美元大關，整體AI基礎建設的擴張也顯示出這場大廠間的軍備競賽已進入白熱化階段，四大超大規模業者2026年合計資本支出計畫已攀升至7...

article.title: Gemini app getting full redesign that overhauls every part of the UI
article.summary: Google has been working on a Gemini app redesign for the past few months , and we now have our first look at the full overhaul. more…
article.title_zh: Gemini 應用程式將進行全面重新設計，革新整個 UI
article.summary_zh: Google 過去幾個月一直在進行 Gemini 應用程式重新設計，現在首次展示了完整的改版。

article.title: xAI 坐擁 55 萬顆 NVIDIA GPU，使用率傳僅 11% 落後 Meta、Google
article.summary: 外媒 The Information 報導，馬斯克（Elon Musk）掌控的 xAI 目前只能利用其全部 N […]
article.title_zh: xAI坐擁55萬顆NVIDIA GPU，使用率傳僅11%落後Meta、Google
article.summary_zh: 馬斯克掌控的xAI儘管擁有55萬顆NVIDIA GPU，但使用率僅約11%，使用效率遠低於Meta及Google。

article.title: This must-have miniature Macintosh retro dock gives your M4 Mac Mini a 1980s makeover — equipped with a 5-inch HD display and M.2 NVMe SSD slot
article.summary: The Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station will add USB ports, memory card readers, and an external SSD enclosure to your Mac mini while giving you a small '80s Macintosh on your desk.
article.title_zh: 必備迷你 Macintosh 復古擴展塢為您的 M4 Mac Mini 打造 1980 年代風格 — 配備 5 英寸 HD 顯示屏和 M.2 NVMe SSD 插槽
article.summary_zh: Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station 為 Mac mini 增添 USB 連接埠、記憶卡讀卡機和外部 SSD 外殼，同時在桌面上呈現懷舊的 80 年代 Macintosh 風貌。

article.title: Apple stops selling the M4 Mac Mini's 256GB storage model through its online store
article.summary: Apple launched the M4 chip-powered Mac Mini in 2024, with its base model having 256GB of storage. This model went out of stock on Apple's online store last month in some countries, including the US, and has now been removed from Apple's website worldwide. As a result, the new base storage for the M4 Mac Mini on Apple's website is 512GB, which costs $799 with the default 16GB RAM option. There are two more RAM options - 24GB and 32GB. If you want more storage, you can upgrade to 1TB or 2TB. If you upgrade to the M4 Pro chip, you can get the Mac Mini with up to 64GB RAM and up to 8TB...
article.title_zh: Apple 停止通過在線商店銷售 M4 Mac Mini 的 256GB 存儲模型
article.summary_zh: Apple 在 2024 年推出了搭載 M4 芯片的 Mac Mini，基礎型號配有 256GB 存儲。該型號上月在包括美國在內的部分國家的 Apple 在線商店缺貨，現已從 Apple 網站全球下架。

article.title: Popular 90s search engine ‘Ask Jeeves’ finally bites the dust — parent company shutters website that pioneered natural language queries, only a placeholder results page remains
article.summary: IAC, the parent company of Ask Jeeves, is finally putting the search engine out to pasture after 30 years.
article.title_zh: 熱門 90 年代搜尋引擎 'Ask Jeeves' 終於走向末路 — 母公司關閉這個開創自然語言查詢的網站，僅剩佔位符結果頁面
article.summary_zh: IAC 作為 Ask Jeeves 的母公司，在 30 年後終於停止營運這個搜尋引擎。
